Notice Of Application And Hearing For Right To Atttach Order, For Issuance Of Writ;Request For Taking Judicial Notice
Off Calendar Sep-14-2005 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
NO APPEARANCE. TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED. Plaintiff's application for a right to attach order and writ of attachment is ordered off calendar as it was not timely served. CCP Section 1005, as amended by AB 3078, Chapter 171, Statutes of 2004, requires that motions be served and filed 16 court days prior to the hearing, with five calendar days added if the motion was served by mail. The motion was filed on August 18, 2005. COMMISSIONER: BRUCE E. CHAN
